meta.title: Full Project Renovation: AI-Driven Agile Archaeology & Refactor Plan

hero.title: Full Project Renovation: AI-Driven Agile Archaeology & Refactor Plan
hero.subtitle: End design drift and technical debt through AI archaeology, data boundary isolation, Figma design system rebuild, and the Matt Pocock Skills pipeline.

groups.title: Messy frontend code
items: Non-recommended patterns that trigger hard-to-debug framework bugs

groups.title: No backend specification
items: Cannot infer API response format from frontend code alone; extra guards added as workarounds
Inconsistent error formats leading to scattered error-handling logic
Chaotic naming and shapes; transforms are scattered, making original values hard to trace

vision.heading: Pain Points vs Renovation Vision
as_is_items: Design specs out of sync with production
Chaotic backend formats with scattered transforms
to_be_items: Figma design system synced with code
AI Agent dispatch with clear human-AI boundaries
Data boundary isolation with clean types

roles.heading: Spec Creation: 4-Role Skills Workflow
roles.subheading: Define human-AI boundaries and distill chaos into freezable fact documentation.

cards.title: 1. Code Archaeologist
cards.task: Map As-is behavior, extract pure business logic, eliminate dead code.

cards.title: 2. Data Boundary Planner
cards.task: Block dirty backend formats; define clean interfaces; consolidate transformers.

cards.title: 3. Behavior Test Architect
cards.task: Convert flow.md + schemas into decoupled BDD acceptance tests.

cards.title: 4. Documentation Auditor
cards.task: Audit archaeology progress from a code-coverage perspective.

docflow.heading: Top-Level Architecture & Document Flow
docflow.subheading: From legacy codebase to freezable Main Docs.
docflow.diagram:
graph TD
    Code["Legacy codebase"] -->|Repomix / Cursor| R1["1. Code Archaeologist"]
    R1 -->|As-is behavior| Flow["records/…/flow.md"]
    Payload["Raw API JSON"] --> R2["2. Data Boundary Planner"]
    Flow --> R2
    Comp["Legacy components & Store"] --> R2
    R2 -->|To-be clean types| Schema["main/contract-schemas/"]
    R2 --> Ctx["context.md"]
    R1 --> Ctx
    Flow --> R3["3. Behavior Test Architect"]
    Schema --> R3
    R3 -->|BDD| BDD["records/…/e2e-cases.feature"]
    Flow --> R4["4. Documentation Auditor"]
    Schema --> R4
    BDD --> R4
    R4 -->|Coverage audit| Check["survey-checklist.md"]
    Check -->|100%| Final["Main Docs freeze point"]

docstructure.heading: Output Directory Convention
docstructure.tree:
docs/
├── context.md               # Global terminology (permanent)
├── survey-checklist.md      # Archaeology progress tracker
├── records/                 # Staging (deletable after freeze)
│   └── [domain]/
│       ├── flow.md
│       └── e2e-cases.feature
└── main/                    # Single Source of Truth
    ├── flows/
    ├── pages/
    └── contract-schemas/
        ├── shared/
        └── endpoints/

categories.title: 1. Core Domain Flows
categories.note: Cross-page flows — full flow.md + contract-schemas + BDD required.

categories.title: 2. Static & Content Pages
categories.note: Stored in i18n files (no CMS). List blocks and i18n keys in docs/main/pages/ only.

freeze.heading: Change Management & Main Docs Freeze
phase1_items: survey-checklist.md 100% → freeze point, PM change discussion
phase2_items: Feature branches modify docs/main/ (always To-be endpoint)
PR includes CHANGELOG.md with ticket links
Docs merge with code — code is docs, docs is code

figma.heading: Figma Design System
figma.org_desc: Figma Professional cannot cross-file link Variables — Standard Recipe architecture.
figma.variables_note: ⚠️ Creating Figma Variables requires at least a Pro plan Full seat (not Collab seat).
figma.org_central: Central Workspace → Core shadcn Template (Primitives + Standard Components)
figma.org_local: Per-project → Copy template + Local Semantic overrides + 100% As-is screen rebuild
figma.pattern_central: Central: 100% identical logic & visuals, zero customization (e.g. Japan map selector) → Copy-Paste
figma.pattern_local: Local: Product-specific semantics (BookingCard, CouponSelector) → Central shadcn base + local assembly
figma.token_subheading: Designers may only use Layer 3 Semantic tokens on canvas.
figma.align_desc: 100% structural alignment with production. Figma component Description must note i18n key.
figma.align_example: Canvas shows "Please enter your booking code" → Description: [i18n-key] booking.field.code_placeholder

i18n_prep.heading: Translation Preparation
i18n_prep.note: Archaeology docs via Claude Web; renovation implementation via Cursor.
steps: AI consolidates legacy translations to JSON (status: active | unused | in-progress)
Script compares legacy_key vs original translations; flag dynamic keys as active manually
Script writes to Google Spreadsheet (single sheet + namespace; Instruction Sheet for Tone Guide)
Gemini can handle initial translation delegation (Japanese: 敬體)
New project script syncs Sheet → code (filter unused; in-progress shows 🚧)
SKILL.md rule: missing keys → hardcode + // TODO: i18n-missing, never invent keys

dev.heading: Development: Matt Pocock Agent Skills Split
dev.subheading: Matt Pocock's 5-step Skills pipeline with clear Claude vs Cursor responsibilities.
dev.claude_desc: Documentation, requirement clarification, PRD writing, atomic issue breakdown. Strict process for planning.
dev.cursor_desc: TDD red-green-refactor, architecture deepening, actual code renovation. Some issues for juniors; seniors gate with Cursor Agent.

skills.name: Grill-with-Docs
skills.desc: Walk the design tree using archaeology docs

skills.name: To-PRD
skills.desc: Produce PRD with user stories and module sketch

skills.name: To-Issues
skills.desc: Break PRD into vertical-slice issues with blocking relations

skills.name: TDD
skills.desc: Red-green-refactor loop; one test, one implementation

skills.name: Architecture-Refactor
skills.desc: Deepen shallow modules; clarify test boundaries for agents

pipeline.heading: Execution Factory: Sample Atomic Issues
pipeline.subheading: Vertical slices from To-Issues — each cuts through all integration layers (Tracer Bullet).

mock_issues.title: Build BookingCard static component per Figma
Write booking code validation edge case tests

phases.title: Phase 1: Archaeology & Data Boundaries
phases.risk: 🔥 Risk checkpoint: Freeze then PM change discussion

phases.title: Phase 2: Figma System Reorganization
phases.description: Copy central template + Local Semantic + 100% As-is rebuild

phases.title: Phase 3: Development & Refactor Launch
phases.description: After Claude To-Issues: Cursor Agent + juniors run TDD pipeline
